overall.description: Gameplay footage from God of War Ragnarök showing Kratos walking down a rocky shore, boarding a wooden boat with Atreus, and rowing across a vast blue bay toward and past the massive World Serpent (Jörmungandr) whose head forms a rocky island with giant teeth.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky shoreline path leading to water

events.description: character stops walking and enters the wooden boat at the water's edge

agents.ego_description: Kratos walks down the rocky path toward the beached boat, preparing to launch

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face with sparse vegetation
rocky outcrop with orange autumn grass
small wooden rowboat beached on the shore
tall wooden tower structure on distant cliff
calm blue water of the bay

segments.scene_description: Kratos walks along a rocky shoreline path toward a beached wooden boat. The scene is set on a sunny day with clear skies, surrounded by rocky cliffs and sparse autumn vegetation, with a distant watchtower visible across the bay.

scene_state.functional_zone: open bay waters with distant rocky islands

events.description: begins rowing boat across the bay, leaving the shore behind
the massive World Serpent head becomes visible as a distinct rocky formation ahead

agents.ego_description: Kratos rows the boat steadily across the blue bay with Atreus seated in the bow, heading toward the distant serpent formation

notable_agents.action: Atreus sits in the front of the boat, looking ahead toward the destination

entered.detail: dilapidated wooden dock structures on the left shore
massive rocky formation resembling a giant serpent's head with a tower on top

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to open water as Kratos rows across the bay. The wooden ruins of docks pass by on the left while the massive World Serpent head looms larger in the distance. Atreus sits in the bow as they navigate the calm blue waters toward the giant formation.

scene_state.functional_zone: close proximity to the World Serpent's massive head and teeth

events.description: boat approaches the enormous scale of the serpent's head revealing giant teeth
the boat passes close to the serpent's lower teeth, temporarily blocking the view of the background mountains

agents.ego_description: rowing alongside the massive serpent head, navigating past its gaping mouth with enormous stone teeth

entered.detail: massive row of stone teeth forming the lower jaw of the serpent
upper jaw teeth overhanging above the boat
mist rising from waterfalls cascading down the serpent's rocky face

segments.scene_description: The boat navigates in close proximity to the World Serpent's immense head, passing by its gaping maw lined with giant stone teeth. Waterfalls cascade down the rocky face creating mist, while the scale of the mythical creature dominates the scene as they row alongside its jaw.

scene_state.functional_zone: open bay waters departing the serpent

events.description: leaving the serpent behind, entering open water with distant mountain shores visible

agents.ego_description: rowing away from the serpent into the open bay, heading toward distant rocky shores and misty waterfalls

entered.detail: snow-capped rocky mountains forming the distant shoreline
distant rocky cliffs on the left side of the bay

segments.scene_description: The boat rows away from the World Serpent into open waters, with the massive head receding behind. The scene opens up to reveal distant mountain ranges and rocky shorelines ahead, with mist from waterfalls still visible in the distance as they continue across the bay.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rugged shoreline across a vast bay, culminating in a close encounter with a colossal mythical creature. It begins with Kratos walking along a rocky path under clear skies toward a beached wooden boat, with a distant watchtower framing the horizon. As the boat launches into the calm blue waters, the scene shifts to the open bay, passing the ruins of wooden docks while the massive head of the World Serpent looms larger in the distance. The camera then draws close to the creature's immense scale, navigating past a gaping maw of giant stone teeth and cascading waterfalls that fill the air with mist. Finally, the boat rows away from the serpent's jaw into the open sea, leaving the massive head behind as the view expands to reveal distant mountain ranges and rocky shorelines.
